name: Kimsuky Think-Tank and Policy Targeting

victim.description: Korea policy experts, UN Security Council members, journalists covering North Korea, and US-ROK alliance officials

infrastructure.description: Fake personas on LinkedIn and Twitter; lookalike domains impersonating US think tanks; spearphishing via fake research collaboration invites

description: Kimsuky conducted sustained spearphishing and social engineering against Korea policy community using elaborate fake personas posing as academics and journalists. Goal: steal policy documents, map US-ROK policy positions, and identify potential intelligence sources.
